response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content, which is a static promotional image for the 'Drawn to Dawn' 1st concert by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. The audio is an instrumental background track used for the teaser/ending screen. No vocal music was detected, so no lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: A static promotional screen for the 'Drawn to Dawn' 1st concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, accompanied by an instrumental background track throughout the entire duration.

scenes.description: A static promotional image for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert with instrumental music playing throughout.
